name: Satoshi Dashboard
compose:
name: slashnode-satoshi-dashboard
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/satoshi-dashboard/main:v1.1.0
    container_name: satoshi-dashboard
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      SERVE_STATIC: 'true'
      API_PORT: '8410'
      API_HOST: 0.0.0.0
    volumes:
      - web_data:/app/server/.runtime-cache
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8410:8410
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-satoshi-dashboard_web_data
